# Generated upload bundle — do not edit here

These files are **copies**, regenerated by `../sync.sh` from the repo's
source-of-truth versions. Edit the originals, not these:

- `DESIGN.md`      ← repo `DESIGN.md`
- `MOD-STATUS.md`  ← repo `README.md`
- `LeaderText.xml` ← repo `text/en_us/LeaderText.xml`

Re-run `./chat-project/sync.sh` before re-uploading to the Chat project.
